executives.name: Ross McElroy
executives.background: Mr. McElroy is a professional geologist with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He has been instrumental in several major uranium discoveries, including the Triple R deposit. He previously held positions with Cameco Corp., Areva, and BHP Billiton.

executives.name: Aaron Keay
executives.background: Mr. Keay is an experienced entrepreneur and capital markets professional. He has served as a director and officer of several public companies in the resource and technology sectors.

executives.name: Dwayne Melrose
executives.background: Mr. Melrose has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in exploration and project development. He was formerly the President and CEO of LiCo Energy Metals and held senior roles at Cameco.

board_of_directors.name: Ross McElroy
board_of_directors.background: Professional geologist with over 35 years of experience. Instrumental in the discovery of the Triple R deposit.

board_of_directors.name: Devinder Randhawa
board_of_directors.background: Founder of Fission Uranium and Fission Energy. Experienced in corporate finance and resource company management.

board_of_directors.name: Frank Estergaard
board_of_directors.background: Chartered Professional Accountant and former partner at KPMG. Extensive experience in auditing and financial consulting for public companies.

board_of_directors.name: William Marsh
board_of_directors.background: Geologist with over 40 years of experience in the uranium industry, including senior roles at Cameco Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Rob Chang
board_of_directors.background: Former Managing Director and Head of Metals & Mining at Cantor Fitzgerald. Expert in uranium market analysis.

sources.source_description: Fission Uranium Corp. Corporate Website - Management and Directors Page
